name: RFP Catalog
description: Clean approved product, pricing, SKU, and spec package for the buyer.

name: Portal-Lite
description: Private customer catalog where buyer can browse, select, and submit an order request.

name: NetSuite-Backed Portal
description: Portal reads selected item, price, inventory, and customer data from NetSuite.

name: True Punchout
description: Buyer procurement-system integration using cXML/OCI/etc. if required by the RFP.
